message:
fix(daemon): kill stale agent sessions when patrols are disabled (hq-2mstj)

When daemon.json disables patrols, the daemon correctly skipped spawning
new sessions but did not kill existing ones. A stale deacon from a prior
daemon run would keep its own patrol loop alive, independently spawning
witnesses and refineries -- defeating the purpose of disabling patrols.

Now the daemon actively terminates leftover sessions for disabled patrols
on each heartbeat: deacon+boot, witnesses, and refineries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
